title: 1 January 2026: Update to the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fees
body: "The Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fee structure changed on 1 January 2026 and is as follows.  Transmittal fee   £75   Search fee   £1,605   International fee   for the first 30 sheets: £1,242 for each sheet over 30: £14   Restoration for restoration of priority   £150   Reductions for e-filing   electronic filing (not being in character coded format): £187 electronic filing (being in character coded format): £280   Fees for preparation of priority document   £20   "
